use_cases: Displaying service incident counts in DevOps dashboards
Monitoring reliability metrics across multiple services in SaaS platforms
Visualizing incident distribution for on-call and SRE teams
ai_summary: A compact dark-themed incident report card featuring a multi-colored bar chart that visualizes incident counts across different services. The component uses gradient-colored bars with subtle glow effects on a black background, designed for embedding in monitoring dashboards and on-call interfaces for SaaS and DevOps teams.
